{"schemaVersion":"1.0","tenantSlug":"costura","programSlug":"primer-proyecto","slug":"bolsa-simple","title":"Mi primer proyecto de costura","status":"published","order":1,"contentVersion":"1.0.0","experienceType":"project","presentationMode":"project","entryModes":["standard"],"unlockRule":{"type":"always"},"completionRule":{"type":"responses_present","responseKeys":["pasos","acabado"]},"sections":[
 {"id":"portada-proyecto","type":"cover","tone":"primary","navigationLabel":"Inicio","title":"Mi primer proyecto de costura","description":"Crea una bolsa simple con los materiales que ya tienes.","blocks":[]},
 {"id":"materiales","type":"orientation","tone":"neutral","navigationLabel":"Materiales","title":"Prepara tus materiales","blocks":[{"id":"lista-materiales","type":"checklist","version":1,"title":"Necesitarás","items":[{"id":"tela","label":"Tela"},{"id":"hilo","label":"Hilo"},{"id":"aguja","label":"Aguja"}]}]},
 {"id":"video-maestra","type":"creator_message","tone":"secondary","navigationLabel":"Video","title":"Mira el proceso completo","creator":{"displayName":"Lina","role":"Guía del taller"},"blocks":[{"id":"video-demostracion","type":"video","version":1,"title":"Prepara tu proyecto","assetRef":"video-proyecto"}]},
 {"id":"concepto-costura","type":"concept","tone":"calm","navigationLabel":"Concepto","title":"Una costura resistente","blocks":[{"id":"margen-costura","type":"richText","version":1,"paragraphs":["Mantén un margen constante para unir las piezas de manera uniforme."]}]},
 {"id":"pasos-proyecto","type":"example","tone":"accent","navigationLabel":"Pasos","title":"Orden del proyecto","blocks":[{"id":"pasos","type":"checklist","version":1,"title":"Checklist","items":[{"id":"cortar","label":"Cortar las piezas"},{"id":"unir","label":"Unir los lados"},{"id":"rematar","label":"Rematar el borde"}]}]},
 {"id":"practica-proyecto","type":"practice","tone":"calm","navigationLabel":"Práctica","title":"Construye tu pieza","blocks":[{"id":"acabado","type":"singleChoice","version":1,"label":"¿Qué acabado elegiste?","options":[{"value":"recto","label":"Borde recto"},{"value":"doblado","label":"Borde doblado"}]}]},
 {"id":"resultado-proyecto","type":"result","tone":"success","navigationLabel":"Resultado","result":{"title":"Tu proyecto está terminado","summary":"Registraste las decisiones de tu pieza.","rules":[{"when":{"responseKey":"acabado","equals":"recto"},"title":"Acabado recto","body":"Elegiste un cierre simple y funcional."},{"when":{"responseKey":"acabado","equals":"doblado"},"title":"Acabado doblado","body":"Elegiste un borde reforzado."}]},"blocks":[]},
 {"id":"proyecto-siguiente","type":"next_step","tone":"primary","navigationLabel":"Siguiente","title":"Elige tu siguiente proyecto","blocks":[{"id":"continuar-proyecto","type":"action","version":1,"title":"Ver siguiente proyecto","description":"Continúa practicando.","href":"/proyectos/siguiente"}]}
